assumptions: Group 1 includes AnalysisTranscripts, AnalysisConditionDetail, DomainAnalysisValueDetail, TranscriptList, TranscriptRow, and TranscriptViewer.
This slice is UI-only; no backend contract, worker, export, or analytics-math changes are in scope.
Mixed legacy/V2 runs should stay on the legacy display mode until the relevant surface is fully V2-backed.
discovery.summary: Upgrade the presentation-only transcript surfaces in group 1 so they consistently show the new canonical decision wording while preserving legacy fallback behavior where the run is not fully V2-backed.
acceptance_criteria: Existing legacy-only runs keep their current behavior.
